title: move old registries.conf v1 files to v2
body:
The v1 syntax will no longer accepted with recent image changes.

comments.body: tmt tests failed for commit b82211b12b9bda063b11c88ced167ccddf32a5bb. @lsm5, @psss, @thrix please check.
tmt tests failed for commit bf76b9133fa9235fdc09c89f737d7b3c1bad7ad0. @lsm5, @psss, @thrix please check.
I have restarted the two failed tests, they look flakey to me.
pckit tests can be ignored for a chnage like this, the tmt-revdeps is known to be not working https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28555
